\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classRWGFun}{RWGFun}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em RWG basis function tied to a mesh triangle. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Header for the \doxylink{classRWGFun}{RWGFun} class. 

The \doxylink{classRWGFun}{RWGFun} class represents a Rao–\+Wilton–\+Glisson (RWG) basis function defined on a single triangular facet (half RWG). It stores the owner triangle, the "{}free"{} vertex, the associated edge in the mesh, and whether the function is inverted w.\+r.\+t. the facet\textquotesingle{}s FRONT/\+BACK side. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{RWGFun_8h_source}{RWGFun.\+h}}.
